title: onosma sulaimaniaca
intro: Onosma sulaimaniaca is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae, commonly known as the Sulaimaniaca or Iraqi Gold. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its potential medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Onosma sulaimaniaca include its ability to treat various conditions such as fever, cough, and skin infections, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Onosma sulaimaniaca can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies in the Middle East and other parts of the world.
